utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 6 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, and total_budget (7 total). The final package includes: destination (Lisbon, Portugal) – fully specified; travel_dates (provided with exact dates) – fully specified; transportation (flight details with costs, airline, class, baggage, total cost, etc.) – fully specified; accommodation (hotel name, type, star rating, cost, etc.) – fully specified; activities (types, cost, duration, etc.) – fully specified; additional_services (insurance_coverage and cancellation_policy) – present but missing explicit costs, which are required per the format; total_budget (complete cost breakdown) – included. Therefore, 6 items are fully specified, and 1 (additional_services) is missing costs.
